purpose: Sample JP / Hviti Service Bridge mission queue for local import and API testing.

missions.title: Find CAD Designer roles
missions.target: CAD Designer III roles near Grand Rapids
missions.action: Search and prepare a shortlist for review
missions.permission: User review required before any application
missions.evidence: Job URL, employer, pay range, and application status
missions.fallback: LinkedIn or direct employer career pages

missions.title: Plan interview transportation
missions.target: Reliable round-trip transportation to an interview
missions.action: Prepare pickup, destination, timing, and fare ceiling
missions.permission: User must approve fare and book the ride
missions.fallback: Lyft, public transit, or a trusted driver

missions.title: Plan food for a work session
missions.target: Affordable meal delivery during a focused work block
missions.action: Search meal options within the budget and dietary constraints
missions.permission: User must approve restaurant, total, and order
